description: An all-muscle lean store — zero planted fat. THE post-fat-exhaustion probe: the only correct run is a NO-OP (LEAN band, silent). Any change here is over-compression; any lost needle is the exact fact-loss the infinity-loop benchmark exists to measure.

muscle.needle: feat fix refactor docs test chore perf ci
deprecation window of one minor version
capped exponential backoff with full jitter
no empty catch, wrap with cause
